raw.subject: The Food Trucks Plaza in Tampa; Something I noticed about The Food Trucks Plaza
raw.body:
Hi,

I saw that you're getting ready for Benito Bowl el Domingo and that Papi's Pizza will be serving their delicious Calzón "Meat Lover". I love the energy around your Super Bowl event!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet. As a food truck plaza, I think you're missing out on bookings and calls that could be coming in through a dedicated online presence.

I sketched out a homepage idea that brings together some of the flavors and community vibes I've seen on your Facebook page. It has a menu hero section, an hours block, a photo gallery, and map & directions.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-food-trucks-plaza-tampa

Let's discuss how to bring this idea to life with a simple flat fee for local businesses. Would love to chat or hear from you.
